thread.title: S. Korea to provide US$6 mln to support Ukrainian grain export initiative
thread.title_full: S. Korea to provide US$6 mln to support Ukrainian grain export initiative

author: Deok-Hyun Kim
title: S. Korea to provide US$6 mln to support Ukrainian grain export initiative
text: National 13:09 November 24, 2024 SEOUL, Nov. 24 (Yonhap) -- South Korea said Sunday it plans to contribute US$6 million worth of humanitarian aid for a World Food Programme initiative to provide Ukrainian grain to countries vulnerable to famine and drought next year. Second Vice Foreign Minister Kang In-sun announced the plan at a meeting of the "Grain from Ukraine" that aims to allocate part of Ukrainian grain exported through the Black Sea to countries facing food shortages, according to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. During the meeting, Kang highlighted South Korea's willingness to bolster global cooperation over the global food crisis, the ministry said in a statement. kdh@yna.co.kr (END) - S.
